summary: Audience recording lacks clarity and depth compared to other tapes, offering a sub‑par listening experience.
review: The audience (AUD) source is described as not as clear and deep as other recordings, resulting in diminished audio quality. No comments were made about the musical performance or setlist.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one low‑star review focusing on poor recording clarity; no information on show quality, so rating reflects weak audio with limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Less clear and deep than comparable recordings; lacks definition and depth.
